question: What is the function of the alias argument within a provider block?
answer: Creates a named non-default provider configuration
explanation: The alias argument creates an additional named provider configuration within a provider block. Resources reference it using the provider meta-argument. A provider block without alias is the default configuration.

options.text: Limits the provider to a specific version
Creates a named non-default provider configuration
Sets the default region for the provider

question: What is the purpose of the -refresh-only flag in terraform apply?
answer: Updates state to match real-world infrastructure
explanation: The -refresh-only flag tells Terraform to update state to match real-world infrastructure without proposing resource changes. It is useful after out-of-band changes. Without it, terraform apply also proposes modifications.

options.text: Updates state to match real-world infrastructure
Refreshes provider plugins to latest versions
Deletes and recreates all managed resources
